### set_pheno

>  set_pheno (key:<function PRNGKey>, pop:chewc.pop.Population,
>                 traits:chewc.trait.TraitCollection, ploidy:int,
>                 h2:jaxtyping.Float[Array,'nTraits'],
>                 cor_e:Optional[jaxtyping.Float[Array,'nTraitsnTraits']]=None)

\*JIT-compatible wrapper to set phenotypes.

The `ploidy` argument is handled by creating a partially applied
function that is then JIT-compiled.\*
